task_completion.description: Locate and open the phishing email to identify the sender's domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout interface showing the email opened with the subject 'CRITICAL: Server Access Expiring' and the sender address 'alert@network-security-update.io' visible.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Global Blacklist or Spam settings page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeScout settings page for managing blocked domains, spam, or blacklists is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct wildcard domain format to block the sender's domain.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the blacklist rule containing exactly '*@network-security-update.io'.

task_completion.description: Add the required note to the blacklist rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field or note section associated with the blacklist rule containing exactly 'Phishing campaign March 2026'.

task_completion.description: Save and confirm the creation of the global blacklist rule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The blacklist rule '*@network-security-update.io' with the note 'Phishing campaign March 2026' is visible in the list of active/saved global blacklist rules.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeScout web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser with the FreeScout UI, not a terminal window or script editor executing database/API commands.

integrity.description: The rule was created within the actual application settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The blacklist rule appears within the structural layout of the FreeScout settings page, with appropriate application styling, menus, and buttons.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the email or mailbox to identify the domain before creating the rule.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is at least one screenshot showing the agent viewing the email or mailbox containing the sender's address prior to the settings page screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain to block: network-security-update.io. Expected rule value: *@network-security-update.io. Expected note: Phishing campaign March 2026.
